subcodes.title: Words spoken in a private home in Chelsea, Sep. 1911
subcodes.first_line: All art is a gift of the Holy Spirit. When this light shines through the mind of a musician, it manifests itself in beautiful harmonies. Again, shining through the mind of a poet
subcodes.subjects: @creativity in art, @literature; drama; humanities; the arts, @music and singing, @The Holy Spirit
